items.name_en: 26C Series Blue Suede CF Bag, classic quilted + light gold hardware, retro and sophisticated! Soft suede, perfect for autumn and winter vibes. Chain strap design, shoulder or crossbody, just the right size, super practical for daily outings. The 26C Series colors and materials have a vacation feel, a must-have for fashionistas!
